hero.kicker: 9 BEDROOMS · 22 GUESTS · 20 MINUTES FROM ATHENS AIRPORT
hero.title: Villa Lithos Porto Rafti
hero.subtitle: A 9-bedroom, 800 m² luxury villa on a 5,000 m² private estate in Porto Rafti, Greece, with a heated infinity pool, padel court, sauna, and elevator, 16 km from Athens International Airport.

marquee.text: VILLA LITHOS PORTO RAFTI • 9 BEDROOMS • 22 GUESTS • INFINITY POOL • PADEL COURT • OUTDOOR SAUNA • PRIVATE ELEVATOR • 20 MINUTES FROM ATHENS AIRPORT • CONCIERGE •

villaIntro.kicker: Luxury villa, 20 minutes from Athens International Airport
villaIntro.title: Villa Lithos Porto Rafti
villaIntro.tagline: A 9-bedroom luxury retreat on the Athenian Riviera with room for 22 guests and amenities rare in Greece, padel court, outdoor sauna, and a private elevator across four floors.
bodyParagraphs: Villa Lithos Porto Rafti is a 9-bedroom, 800 m² luxury villa set on a 5,000 m² private estate in Porto Rafti, Attica, Greece, 16 km from Athens International Airport. The villa sleeps up to 22 guests across nine bedrooms and 8.5 bathrooms, with two living rooms and generous outdoor space designed for families, multi-generational groups, and corporate retreats.

Inside the gates, guests have exclusive use of a heated infinity pool with panoramic sea views, an outdoor sauna, a jacuzzi, a private padel court, a fully equipped gym, two living rooms, and a private elevator that connects all four floors. Goldenberg Luxe manages the property and the concierge team is on call throughout the stay.
spaceParagraphs: Inside, the contemporary interiors blend modern design with warm Mediterranean touches. Two spacious living rooms, on the ground floor and lower level, provide versatile spaces for relaxation, conversation, or quiet moments.

The designer kitchen is fully equipped with premium appliances and a walk-in pantry, perfect for preparing memorable meals during your stay near Athens. A private chef can be arranged on request through the Villa Lithos concierge team.

concierge.title: Concierge Services
concierge.kicker: Personalized hospitality tailored to your stay.
paragraphs: At Villa Lithos, our dedicated concierge team manages every detail of your stay, whether you're visiting with family or hosting a corporate retreat in Porto Rafti.
From arranging private chefs and pre-stocking the villa to daily housekeeping and curating authentic Greek experiences, we ensure your time near Athens is effortless and memorable.
Private guests and corporate groups receive the same meticulous attention. Every stay at our luxury villa runs seamlessly.
concierge.closingText: From small requests to grand arrangements, we're here to help.

gallery.title: Gallery
gallery.subtitle: A Visual Journey
gallery.description: Every corner tells a story of craftsmanship and natural beauty.

map.title: Location
map.address: Villa Lithos, Vravronos 70, Porto Rafti 190 03, Greece
map.gettingHereIntro: Villa Lithos is ideally situated in Porto Rafti, one of Attica's most sought-after coastal destinations. Enjoy the perfect balance of serene privacy and convenient access to Athens International Airport, the city center, and the pristine beaches of the Athenian Riviera.

distances.name: Athens City Center

distances.name: Rafina Port (Islands Ferry)
distances.detail: 20 min drive, gateway to Cyclades & Evia
